description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn and featuring a paved driveway leading to the front entrance. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal gray siding, complemented by white trim around the windows and doors. The house has multiple large windows, including a prominent bay window section on one side and a set of French doors opening onto a rear patio. The roof is flat, with no visible overhangs or gables, giving the structure a modern, streamlined appearance. The front entryway is accessed by a short set of steps and a walkway, and the house includes both front and rear outdoor living spaces. The interior layout is partially visible, showing several rooms and open spaces, suggesting a comfortable residential design.
description: A modern, single-story house with gray siding, white trim, large windows, and a flat roof, set on a green lawn with a driveway and patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, walkway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bay window section and rear patio area with brown decking.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large French doors opening onto a spacious patio and multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window and the driveway extending to the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and large French doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, white trim, and a small porch area leading from a paved walkway
